task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler using the + button
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new tiddler editor opens in TiddlyWiki.

task_completion.description: Set the title to 'RESTful API Design Guide'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field shows 'RESTful API Design Guide'.

task_completion.description: Include internal wiki links to existing tiddlers using [[]] syntax
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered tiddler shows clickable internal links (displayed as highlighted text) to 'Agile Methodology Overview' and 'Version Control Best Practices'.

task_completion.description: Write content about API design with relevant keywords
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler contains text about REST, API, endpoints, versioning, authentication, or similar API design topics.
Tag pills showing 'Technology' and 'API' are visible.
The tiddler is saved and displayed in view mode with rendered content and clickable links.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the TiddlyWiki web interface in Firefox.

integrity.description: Verify the internal links actually point to existing tiddlers
integrity.visual_evidence: Links are rendered as clickable text (not red/missing links) pointing to actual tiddlers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task creates 'RESTful API Design Guide' tiddler with [[Agile Methodology Overview]] and [[Version Control Best Practices]] internal links. Tags: Technology, API. Content about REST API design best practices.
